subcodes.first_line: O Mahdi! Tablets of holy radiance have I revealed and sent unto thee, that perchance thou mayest be illumined by their light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهدی الواح قدس منیر بتو انزال و ارسال فرمودم که شاید بانوارش مستضی ء شده
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution
